name: Chilled Chocolate Almond Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie plate with foil.
2. Melt together half of the chocolate bar and vegetable oil until smooth.
3. Stir in almonds. Spread evenly on the bottom and sides of the pie plate and chill.
4. Lift out of the pan and peel off the foil. Place the chocolate shell back into the pie plate.
5. Melt marshmallows, remaining chocolate bar, milk, vanilla extract, and almond extract in a double boiler. Remove from heat and let cool.
6. Fold in whipped cream. Pour into the chocolate shell and chill overnight.
